name: GCash
description: GCash — Philippines mobile wallet by Globe with QR payments, bank transfers, bills payment, and merchant API integration.

seo.title: GCash — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: GCash: GCash — Philippines mobile wallet by Globe with QR payments, bank transfers, bills payment, and merchant API integration.

when_to_use: QR payment acceptance for Philippine merchants via GCash merchant API
Digital wallet payment integration for Philippine e-commerce platforms
Bills payment and bank transfer via GCash API for fintech in Philippines
Disbursements to GCash wallets for gig workers and contractors in Philippines

cons: Consumer app is the core, APIs secondary
review.verdict: Required checkbox for merchants serving Philippine consumers — wallet dominance makes it essential locally.
review.best_for: Merchants selling online or in-store to Philippine consumers
review.not_for: Businesses outside the Philippines or wanting card-first rails

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
